Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: In this scenario, your task group has exited Petropavlovsk and has been ordered to seek out and destroy a small American convoy heading towards Attu Island from Hawaii.
You are supported by a Tu-95RT long-range reconnaissance aircraft out of Kamchatka. Also, the fleet has stationed spy trawlers around the North Pacific to monitor for US traffic.

This area of the ocean is a heavily traveled sea lane used by neutral merchant shipping. Part of our goal is to prevent unnecessary civilian casualties, which requires us to positively identify the US ships before engaging.
